message:
fix(scroll): add cross-browser scroll metrics and IntersectionObserver fallback

Comprehensive fix for scroll progress tracking and reveal animations
across mobile/desktop browsers with varying scroll reporting behavior.

## lib/utils.ts
Add getScrollMetrics() utility that handles cross-browser differences:
- Checks window.scrollY, scrollingElement, documentElement, and body
- Returns scrollTop, maxScroll, and progress (0-1 ratio)
- SSR-safe with typeof window check

## Article components (bakery, barra, overprompting, raptorq)
- Replace manual scroll calculations with getScrollMetrics()
- Add initial handleScroll() call on mount to set correct initial state
- Add IntersectionObserver availability check with fallback:
  - If IntersectionObserver undefined, add .ba-visible to all targets immediately
- Add/remove "ba-reveal-ready" class on mount/unmount for CSS coordination
- Remove unused AnimatePresence import

## Visualization components (barra, cmaes, overprompting)
- Replace Math.random() with deterministicUnit() for reproducible rendering
- Use component-specific seed offsets to maintain visual uniqueness
- Apply deterministic sampling in CosmosStars, RegressionPlot, ParticleField
- Fix CMA-ES visualization initialization with proper seeding

## barra-jargon.tsx
- Minor cleanup: remove unused AnimatePresence import

These changes fix mobile Safari scroll progress issues and eliminate
React hydration mismatches from non-deterministic Math.random() calls.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
